summary: Mixed reception – one fan hails the new copy as a huge upgrade, another claims it isn’t an improvement.
review: The recording has drawn sharply divided opinions. No concrete details about sound quality or performance are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: One very positive review (5★) and one strongly negative review (0★) balance out to an average rating; limited detail keeps confidence at medium.
